headline: Digital Realty Expands Lisbon And Sofia Presence To Capture AI Data Flows
summary: Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) is expanding into Portugal and Bulgaria with data center acquisitions in Lisbon and Sofia. The Lisbon site is intended to serve as a data gateway between Europe, Africa, and the Americas. The Sofia acquisition gives the company a new foothold in Southeast Europe to support digital infrastructure needs. Digital Realty Trust, a global data center and interconnection operator, is expanding further into Europe as data traffic and AI workloads reshape...
